{
  "claims": [
    "The Indian Gaming Special Distribution Fund needs greater accountability measures.",
    "AB 553 aims to eliminate misuses of funds that come from California Tribes.",
    "The distribution fund was created to pay for activities related to tribal gaming and to provide services for individuals suffering from problem gambling.",
    "As of June 2022, the distribution fund's balance of $127 million was enough to pay for nearly four years of expenditures.",
    "The balance of the distribution fund is significantly higher than the level suggested by a Government Finance Officers Association best practice.",

    "AB 553 aims to create greater transparency to identify future problems."

}
